meta.title: Chu Huy Thai | Junior Unity Game Developer
meta.description: Personal portfolio of Chu Huy Thai - Unity Game Developer specializing in 3D/2D gameplay mechanics, algorithmic efficiency, and performance optimization.

hero.name: Chu Huy Thai
hero.leadText: Unity Game Developer specializing in 3D/2D gameplay systems, technical optimization, and high-performance algorithms. Dedicated to zero-allocation architecture, clean OOP patterns, and solving complex simulation bottlenecks to ship seamless cross-platform experiences.

work.title: Selected game projects
work.description: A selection of game projects and prototypes built through professional work, self-study, and consistent Unity practice.

projects.title: Battle Ship
projects.description: An online multiplayer turn-based strategy game. Developed with reliable custom socket programming to handle real-time state synchronization, turn management, and matchmaking logic, paired with an efficient matrix grid system to process hidden board states and collision queries.

projects.title: Game Jam 2026
projects.description: A Unity game jam project built under time constraints, focused on fast prototyping, core gameplay, quick iteration, and finishing a playable demo.

projects.title: 2 Player
projects.description: A two-player prototype exploring input handling, character interaction, and a simple gameplay loop that can be expanded later.

projects.title: Voxel shooter
projects.description: A high-performance 3D voxel shooter featuring a custom chunk rendering system. Implemented efficient dynamic mesh generation algorithms (such as face-culling/greedy meshing) to minimize vertex counts, alongside a zero-allocation object pooling system for projectiles to maintain stable FPS during intense combat.

about.title: A bit about who I am
paragraphs: I am a Unity Game Developer with a strong emphasis on game technical optimization, core mechanics design, and algorithm implementation across both 2D and 3D environments.

My expertise spans advanced architectural patterns, memory-efficient programming (such as zero-allocation principles and bitwise operations), and multi-platform optimization. I am highly proficient in C#, C++, OOP, and modern .NET development workflows, dedicated to writing clean, maintainable code that maintains high FPS under heavy simulation loads.

skillCards.title: 3D & 2D Architecture
skillCards.description: Designing and building scalable scenes, complex gameplay systems, and mechanics for both 2D and 3D projects.

skillCards.title: Performance Optimization
skillCards.description: Profiling memory layouts, leveraging zero-allocation coding, and using bitwise systems to achieve maximum FPS.

skillCards.title: Algorithmic Systems
skillCards.description: Implementing robust data structures, custom pathfinding, and decision-making logic for complex systems.

reviews.title: What industry peers say
reviews.description: Feedback from technical leads and teammates on performance and architecture.

list.quote: Thai refactored our core simulation loops using zero-allocation structures, successfully eliminating GC spikes and maintaining a locked 60 FPS.
list.name: Technical Lead

list.quote: An outstanding problem solver for 3D math and optimization. His algorithmic lookaheads and spatial indexing completely resolved our pathfinding bottlenecks.
list.name: Project Manager

list.quote: Thai's clean code practices and mastery over structural optimization made collaborating on complex, high-performance mechanics seamless.
list.name: Senior Engineer

list.title: Applying OOP to basic gameplay systems

list.title: Lessons from building prototypes under time pressure
list.description: How to prioritize core gameplay, test quickly, and finish a playable demo.

contact.title: Let's build something playable
contact.description: If you want to discuss a game prototype, a Unity project, or a junior Unity opportunity, feel free to send me a message.
